aboutUs.title: About ICT Services
aboutUs.paragraph: **ICT Services** is a software development brand led by Władysław Danik. The work focuses on practical, maintainable business applications with Salesforce, Apex, Lightning Web Components, React, Java, SQL and API integrations.

whatWeOffer.title: What We Offer
whatWeOffer.paragraph: Support is available for focused development, modernization and integration work across business systems and web applications.

items.title: Custom Software Development
items.paragraph: Building tailored features and internal tools with Java, React, SQL and API-first architecture.

items.title: Salesforce Development
items.paragraph: Creating and improving Salesforce solutions with Apex, Lightning Web Components, flows and platform integrations.

items.title: Web and Frontend Development
items.paragraph: Designing responsive React interfaces that are clear, accessible and easy to maintain.

items.title: Database and API Work
items.paragraph: Structuring SQL data access, backend services and integrations so systems exchange information reliably.

items.title: Code Quality and Collaboration
items.paragraph: Improving code readability, Git workflows and implementation practices for long-term maintainability.

coreCompetencies.title: Core Competencies
coreCompetencies.paragraph: The goal is dependable delivery: clear requirements, thoughtful implementation and code that can be extended later.

items.title: Salesforce Platform
items.paragraph: Apex, Lightning Web Components, declarative automation, CRM customization and integrations.

items.title: Frontend Engineering
items.paragraph: React, JavaScript, responsive layouts, accessibility and reusable UI components.

items.title: Backend and Data
items.paragraph: Java, SQL, REST APIs, data modeling and practical application architecture.

items.title: Communication
items.paragraph: Requirements are translated into concrete implementation steps with regular, direct updates.

ourApproach.title: Approach
ourApproach.paragraph: ICT Services favors straightforward architecture, readable code and incremental delivery. Each project starts with the business problem, then moves toward a solution that is simple enough to operate and flexible enough to grow.

ourTeam.title: Communication
ourTeam.paragraph: Communication is available in **Polish**, **English** and **Russian**. This makes it easier to clarify requirements, document decisions and keep collaboration moving without unnecessary friction.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Work With ICT Services?
whyChooseUs.paragraph: ICT Services is a good fit when you need hands-on implementation, careful modernization or focused technical support without unnecessary overhead.

items.paragraph: Practical solutions shaped around real business workflows.
Experience across Salesforce, React, Java, SQL and APIs.
Direct communication with the person doing the development work.

projects.name: ICT Services Landing Platform
projects.description: A modern React-based landing platform for ICT Services featuring reusable content configuration, legal compliance sections, and a functional contact workflow.

projects.name: Dream Analyzer AI
projects.description: A full-stack AI-powered web application that analyzes user-described dreams and generates multiple interpretations using OpenAI API.

projects.name: Pattern Hasher Library
projects.description: A lightweight Java hashing library implementing a custom pattern-based transformation algorithm, designed for consistent and efficient string hashing across applications.

projects.name: Travel Agency Web Experience
projects.description: A PHP-based web experience simulating a travel agency platform, focused on structured content delivery and responsive UI design.

projects.name: Snake Desktop Game
projects.description: A classic Snake game implemented as a desktop application using Java Swing, focusing on event-driven programming and UI rendering.

projects.workWithNote: The logos below represent platforms, tools, and ecosystems we have experience working with. They do not imply direct partnerships or client relationships.

services.name: Custom Software Development
services.description: Tailored business functionality built with Java, Apex, React and SQL, focused on maintainability and practical workflows.

services.name: Salesforce Development
services.description: Salesforce customization and development with Apex, Lightning Web Components, automations and CRM process improvements.

services.name: Web and Frontend Development
services.description: Responsive React interfaces, landing pages and frontend features designed for clarity, accessibility and easy future changes.

services.name: API and Backend Services
services.description: Backend services, REST APIs and SQL-backed integrations that connect applications and business processes reliably.

services.name: Code Quality and Optimization
services.description: Reviewing and refactoring existing code to improve readability, performance, reliability and maintainability.

services.name: Consultation and Training
services.description: Focused guidance on Salesforce, React and software development practices for individuals or small teams.
